mechanism: EBITDA addbacks embed labor synergies calibrated to higher labor force growth. When synergies fail to materialize under labor scarcity, actual EBITDA falls short of projected, and covenant-lite structures (87%) remove early warning. Models using historical synergy realization rates will underestimate defaults.
regime_dependence: Strongest for mid-market companies in labor-intensive sectors competing for shrinking labor pool. Weaker for capital-intensive or technology-driven businesses. Mitigated if immigration fills labor gaps.
